sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me look at the top yellow shape area more carefully
lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("Top yellow shape area (rows 13-17, cols 28-38):")
for r in range(13, 18):
    print(f"  {r}: '{lines[r][28:38]}'")

# Current token state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
tokens = []
for n in nodes:
    if n['pixels'] <= 10 and n['color'] in ('B', 'w', 'g'):
        min_r = min(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])
        if 38 <= min_r <= 50:
            min_c = min(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])
            tokens.append((n['color'], min_r, min_c))
tokens.sort(key=lambda x: (x[1], x[2]))
h = [t[0] for t in tokens if t[1] == 42]
v = [t[0] for t in tokens if t[1] >= 44]
print(f"\nCurrent - Horizontal: {h}")
print(f"Current - Vertical: {v}")

# Try: horizontal = B,B,B,w,B (4 ON); vertical = B,B,B,B,B (5 ON)
# Current: H=B,w,w,w,B; V=w,B,B,B,w
# Need: toggle H cols 25,30 to B; toggle V cols 21,41 to B
action([
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 42, 'col': 26},  # H col 25
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 42, 'col': 31},  # H col 30
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 45, 'col': 21},  # V col 21
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 45, 'col': 41},  # V col 41
])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
